description:
You are a QA engineer who has just received three raw test-run log files that already live in
    /home/user/qa_reports/ :

        /home/user/qa_reports/run1.log
        /home/user/qa_reports/run2.log
        /home/user/qa_reports/run3.log

    Each log line uses the exact pattern

        YYYY-MM-DD hh:mm:ss [INFO] TESTCASE <TestName> <PASS|FAIL>

    plus a few non-TESTCASE lines (for example environment clean-up messages).  
    Your job is to produce two kinds of artefacts—one summary CSV and one “failed only” log file
    for every test run—using **only awk and sed** (you may combine them with shell redirection,
    pipes, mkdir, etc., but do not use grep, perl, python, cut, jq, etc.).

    Required output artefacts
    ------------------------
    1. A directory  
           /home/user/qa_reports/failed/  
       must be created if it is absent.

    2. A CSV file  
           /home/user/qa_reports/summary.csv  
       with **exactly four data rows plus a header**, using a comma (,) as field separator and a
       trailing newline at the end of the file.  The file **must match this template exactly**:

           test_run,total_cases,pass,fail
           run1.log,3,2,1
           run2.log,3,1,2
           run3.log,3,3,0

       • Column order and spellings are fixed.  
       • No extra spaces before/after commas.  
       • A single newline character after the last line is mandatory.

    3. A “failed only” log for each original log, saved to  
       /home/user/qa_reports/failed/<basename_without_extension>_failed.log  

       The contents must be:

       • run1_failed.log – contains exactly these one line (plus a trailing newline):

             2023-07-01 10:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE ProfileUpdate FAIL

       • run2_failed.log – contains exactly these two lines (each followed by a newline):

             2023-07-01 11:00:05 [INFO] TESTCASE PasswordReset FAIL
             2023-07-01 11:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE TwoFactorAuth FAIL

       • run3_failed.log – because that run has no failures, the file must still be present and
         contain exactly the single line (plus trailing newline):

             NO_FAILURES

    Constraints
    -----------
    • Solve the whole task with **no more than 3–4 distinct command invocations**, built around
      awk and/or sed.  
    • Do not edit the original *.log files.  
    • Do not hard-code the expected numbers; compute them from the logs with awk/sed logic.  
    • Make sure every file you create ends with a newline character so automated diff tests pass.

    When you’re done, the directory tree /home/user/qa_reports/ should look like this (files
    omitted from listing have not changed):

        qa_reports/
        ├── failed/
        │   ├── run1_failed.log
        │   ├── run2_failed.log
        │   └── run3_failed.log
        ├── run1.log
        ├── run2.log
        ├── run3.log
        └── summary.csv

    Feel free to print intermediate command output to the console for your own verification, but
    ensure that only the files and directories described above are created/modified in the end.
truth:
Initial files present before the agent starts
    --------------------------------------------
    /home/user/qa_reports/run1.log
        2023-07-01 10:00:01 [INFO] TESTCASE Login PASS
        2023-07-01 10:00:05 [INFO] TESTCASE Logout PASS
        2023-07-01 10:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE ProfileUpdate FAIL
        2023-07-01 10:00:10 [INFO] Environment cleanup complete

    /home/user/qa_reports/run2.log
        2023-07-01 11:00:01 [INFO] TESTCASE Signup PASS
        2023-07-01 11:00:05 [INFO] TESTCASE PasswordReset FAIL
        2023-07-01 11:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE TwoFactorAuth FAIL
        2023-07-01 11:00:10 [INFO] Environment cleanup complete

    /home/user/qa_reports/run3.log
        2023-07-01 12:00:01 [INFO] TESTCASE Search PASS
        2023-07-01 12:00:05 [INFO] TESTCASE AddToCart PASS
        2023-07-01 12:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE Checkout PASS
        2023-07-01 12:00:10 [INFO] Environment cleanup complete

    Expected artefacts after successful task execution
    --------------------------------------------------
    /home/user/qa_reports/failed/run1_failed.log
        2023-07-01 10:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE ProfileUpdate FAIL

    /home/user/qa_reports/failed/run2_failed.log
        2023-07-01 11:00:05 [INFO] TESTCASE PasswordReset FAIL
        2023-07-01 11:00:07 [INFO] TESTCASE TwoFactorAuth FAIL

    /home/user/qa_reports/failed/run3_failed.log
        NO_FAILURES

    /home/user/qa_reports/summary.csv
        test_run,total_cases,pass,fail
        run1.log,3,2,1
        run2.log,3,1,2
        run3.log,3,3,0
